combined_text: Gloucester City Fire Department You are here: Home / Departments / Gloucester City Fire Department Gloucester City Fire Department In case of emergency – DIAL 9111 North King Street, Gloucester City, NJ 08030P # (856) 456-0231 F # (856) 456-0882Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, 8 am to 5 pm Thursday, 10 am to 7 pm Friday, Closed Acting
